title: IIWM Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Research Associate Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Water Management (IIWM) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Research Associate Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech and Ph.D. students can apply for the IIWM Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, a...
